name: activity
description: Workspace-facing activity feed. Thin wrapper around spatie/laravel-activitylog with our conventions: workspace scoping via BelongsToWorkspace global scope, ULID prefix `act_`, tier-based retention (30 / 90 / 365 days per plan), causer resolution from Sanctum, event batching. Publishes `HasActivityLog` trait (aliases spatie's `LogsActivity` + adds our defaults) and `#[LoggableActivity]` attribute for build-time discovery of models that opt in. Ships workspace HTTP surface `GET /api/v1/activities` filterable via spatie query builder. Distinct from `audit` module which is compliance-grade + 7y cold.

wraps.rationale: Battle-tested activity log with model observation + causer resolution. We inherit their schema + trait + add our conventions (workspace scoping, ULID prefix, tier retention) via HasActivityLog. Our `Activity` model extends theirs; DB table shape unchanged.

central_admin.description: Platform-admin cross-workspace activity search for support incident triage.
